feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP se congela al crear Almacen
entry.content:
Buen día comunidad,

Tengo una situación en un proceso que me solicitaron en la empresa, al momento de crear un almacén nuevo con ubicaciones, al hacer clic en botón Crear se congela SAP inmediatamente y tengo que cerrar forzadamente.

He intentando de varias formas, creando el almacén limpiamente, duplicándolo de otro almacén existente, crear sin ubicaciones.

La única forma que me dejo crearlo fue ponerle la opción de inactivo, pero al querer quitar el cheque de inactivo y Actualizar también se congela el programa SAP. Eliminar el almacén si me permite procesarlo.

como información adicional nos conectamos por servicio RemoteDesktop, la versión de SAP B1 es la 9.3 PL12 64 bits, base de datos SQL server 2016.

NOTA: ya intente replicar el escenario directamente de una sesión remota desde el servidor de producción y sin ningún efecto.

favor de alguna solucion o pista para poder resolver este caso.

entry.title: Please advise if SAP Business One is align with IFRS 18 and how to configure?
entry.content: Please advise if SAP Business One is aligned with IFRS 18? And how do we configure the financial reports based on IFRS 18?

entry.title: SAP Business One System Requirements for HANA and SQL Versions
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing SAP Business One (on-premise) for our clients, both HANA and SQL Server versions.

We understand that for SAP Business One on HANA, the typical minimum requirements is 64 GB RAM. It is just information. We are not aware of any clear hardware sizing guidelines. Plus, we only know certified servers list, it means we cannot install SAP Business One on other servers? 

Could you please advise on the exact system requirements and sizing parameters for both versions?
Additionally, is there any official sizing template or calculator available to estimate the overall hardware requirements?

 


SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One @Darius

entry.title: A/R Invoice Back-Date Error – “There is a document of this type with a later posting date
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing an issue in SAP Business One while adding a back-dated A/R Invoice.

Error Message:

“There is a document of this type with a later posting date – FieldError: Posting Date”

entry.title: "Protocol not allowed" error on PDF/Preview in (KBA 3617976) SAP Business One 10.0 FP2511 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am currently dealing with the "Protocol not allowed" error in SAP Business One 10.0 FP2511 (HANA) when users attempt to preview, print, or export documents to PDF immediately after using the Add & View mode.

The Issue: As documented in SAP KBA 3617976, the system blocks the print/preview protocol when a document is added or updated and then immediately accessed for output while still in the same view.

Current Situation: SAP has acknowledged this as a bug in FP2511 and intends to provide a fix in a future Feature Package. In the meantime, the suggested workarounds are:

  1. Using Add & New and navigating back to the record.

  2. Enabling Automatic Printing/PDF Export in Print Preferences.

The Challenge: The first workaround is significantly impacting user productivity in high-volume environments, and the second workaround (automatic PDF generation) isn't ideal for users who need to manually select layouts or review data before finalizing the output.

My Question to the Community: Aside from the two workarounds mentioned in the KBA, has anyone found a more seamless way to bypass this protocol error?

  • Is there a specific Client-side setting or UI API tweak that helps?

  • Has anyone found a way to "force" the protocol to refresh without navigating away from the document?

  • Are there any specific Windows Environment variables or Crystal Reports runtime settings that might alleviate this?

I would appreciate any creative solutions or "quick-fix" scripts that you've implemented for your clients while we wait for the official patch.

Best regards,

Sunil Patil

Certified SAP Business One Consultant

entry.title: -306 - El nombre de recurso especificado no se encuentra en el archivo de imagen.
entry.content:
Hola,  tengo el siguiente problema, tras una restauracion de la mv donde tengo montado sap, los desarrollos que tenemos conectados por di api nos arrojan el siguiente error:
-306 - El nombre de recurso especificado no se encuentra en el archivo de imagen.
tambien tenemos problemas usando el data transfer de sap  nos arroja el mismo error, creo que puede ser alguna configuracion del di api que hay que revisar  pero no se que configuracion habria que cambiar.

entry.title: SBO Mailer Test Connection Failed – Server Unreachable (SAP B1 10 FP2508)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m trying to configure the SBO Mailer in SAP Business One 10 FP2508.

In the System Landscape Directory, I go to Job Service Configuration and enter the SMTP server, username, password, and port as required. However, when I run the test, I receive the following error:

Test result: Failed
Message: Test connection failed
Trace: Server unreachable or incorrect

The SMTP server is working normally, and the same email account is functioning correctly outside of SAP.

Is there something I might be missing in the configuration?

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Como fazer o Download do SAP Business One 9.2 PL08?
entry.content: Estou precisando do instalador do SAP B1 9.2 PL08, mas no portal SAP nao consigo encontrar mais. Existe algum lugar onde eu consiga encontrar o Download dessa versao?

entry.title: Showing Red Blank Error message while Updating the General Setting (Enable Transaction Notification)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am facing a problem while updating the General Settings > Enable Transaction Notification, which is showing me a red blank error message.
Version: SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.240) SP 2402 (64-bit)
Describing the scenario, Firstly, I took a Replica from our production system. Secondly, I tried to change the company nameunder System Initialization > Company Details. While pressing update then shows me Red Blank message. Thirdly, one person suggested me to Uncheck "Enable Transaction Notification"  under System Initialization > General Setting , and update the Company Name successfully. Fourthly, I tried to enable the transaction notification under the same General Setting. But this time I failed to re-enable this setting, and showing me a blank red message. Even I can't do any transaction like Purchase or Sales. I have attached the reference images. Your suggestion is highly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Issue with DTW Import – Unexpected Ship To Creation and Change Log Behavior
entry.content:
Good morning,

we are experiencing an issue with one of our customers during the mass import of Business Partner data via DTW.

Specifically, in the DTW file we are only populating the following fields: CardCode and Global Location Number.

During the upload (DTW on table OCRD), SAP, for unknown reasons, automatically creates an empty Ship To address for some Business Partners — for example, 4 out of 15 test uploads — therefore inserting a record into table CRD1.

Furthermore, when checking the SAP change log, for the Business Partners where the Ship To address has been automatically created, the system reports — with today’s date (the DTW execution date) — all the previous changes that had already been recorded in the past.

In practice, SAP appears to “repeat” in the change history, under the current date, the latest modifications previously made, in addition to the actual changes generated by the DTW upload.

Have you ever encountered a similar issue? Do you have any insight into how this behavior could occur?

It is unusual that the system writes into different tables, even when DTW is not involved. Furthermore, there are no empty rows in the import file that could explain the automatic creation of a blank record.

 
Thanks
Chiara

entry.title: Stock Movement Register – Summary Report Showing SQL Server Error in HANA Database
entry.content:
Description:

We are facing an issue in the Stock Movement Register – Summary report, which is developed as an add-on report. The error is occurring only for this specific report and it has started from this month, whereas it was working fine until last month. The system is running on SAP Business One HANA; however, the error message displayed is related to SQL Server connectivity, even though the database is HANA.

Error Details:

Logon failed. Details: ADO Error Code: 0x Source: Microsoft OLE DB Provider for SQL Server Description: [DBNETLIB][ConnectionOpen (Connect()).]SQL Server does not exist or access denied. SQL State: 08001 Native Error: Error in File C:\Users\sajari.p\...

entry.title: When login to SAP B1, the add on is not running and system is showing "installtion failed"
entry.content:
Hi Community,
When login to SAP, system is showing this "install failed"

The environment is HANA and I tried reassigning the add on from Extension Manager but then also the add on is not running. Kindly let me know the ways to troubleshoot and solve this issue.

entry.title: Connection Error "-4009 - Failed to connect SLD, make sure SLD server is correct and available"
entry.content:
We are unable to connect with B1 with error   "-4009 - Failed to connect SLD, make sure SLD server is correct and available"

On SAP B1 and DTW  program work properly 

we already follow SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/2029714

Solution 1 

1. The "LicenseServer" value defined in ..\SAP\SAP Business One\Conf\b1-local-machine.xml 
2. The "LicenseServer" value defined in ..\SAP\SAP Business One DI API\Conf\b1-local-machine.xml
3. The "License Server" and "Port Number" defined in SAP Business One Service Manager → Settings
4. The licenseServer field in Integration Framework UI → SLD → B1i Server → Choose Company DB → Connectivity List (Active) 

Solution 2

1. Access SAP Business One System Landscape Directory.
 https://MY_SERVER:40000/ControlCenter
2. If your browser asks for security certification just continue to the Web site.
3. Log on using the default user "B1SiteUser".
4. On the tab Servers and Companies, check the value in the Server Name field.
5. If no entry exists in the Servers section, click Add, and add your server name and IP. Click the entries to ensure that all SBO companies are listed on Companies. => every thing work properly

We have try both IP and server name none of this is success.

entry.title: SAP Business One (SQL) – Unique Users with Assigned License List
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAP Business One (SQL Server) with multiple company databases.

Our requirement is to extract:

  • List of unique users across all company databases

  • Their assigned license type

Since one user can exist in multiple company databases, we would like to understand how to generate a consolidated list of unique users along with their assigned licenses.

Kindly confirm:

  1. Is there any SQL table where license details are stored?

  2. Can license details be extracted directly through a query?

  3. Or is this information available only via License Administration / License Server?

  4. What is the recommended approach to get a unique user-wise license list?

Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: Service Layer endpoint /b1s/v2/Attachments2 - BadFormat error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'am trying to upload a attachment unsing Java Apache HTTP Client version 5 and keep getting the folwowing error:

{
   "error" : {
      "code" : "-1",
      "message" : "BadFormat"
   }
}

Can someone help me find what I could be missing on this test class:

import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.FileInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.security.KeyManagementException;
import java.security.KeyStoreException;
import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;
import java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException;
import java.security.cert.CertificateException;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.Objects;

import javax.net.ssl.SSLContext;

import org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.classic.methods.HttpGet;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.classic.methods.HttpPost;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.entity.mime.HttpMultipartMode;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.entity.mime.MultipartEntityBuilder;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.classic.CloseableHttpClient;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.classic.HttpClientBuilder;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.io.PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.io.PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.routing.RoutingSupport;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.DefaultClientTlsStrategy;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.HostnameVerificationPolicy;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.NoopHostnameVerifier;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.TlsSocketStrategy;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.ClassicHttpResponse;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.ContentType;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.Header;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.HttpEntity;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.HttpHost;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.io.entity.EntityUtils;
import org.apache.hc.core5.ssl.SSLContexts;
import org.apache.hc.core5.ssl.TrustStrategy;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

class TestAttachments2
{
	protected static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(TestAttachments2.class);
	
    private static final String TARGET_URL = "https://127.0.0.1:90000/b1s/v2/Attachments2";
    
    
    void testUpload()
    {
    	final Instant startInstant = Instant.now();
    	
        try
        {
			final HttpGet httpGet = new HttpGet(TARGET_URL);
			String name;
			
			name = "/tmp/test.pdf";
			
			File f = new File(name);
			
			byte[] byteArray = IOUtils.toByteArray(new FileInputStream(name));
			
			final HttpHost host = RoutingSupport.determineHost(httpGet);
			
			final MultipartEntityBuilder builder = MultipartEntityBuilder.create();
			builder.setMode(HttpMultipartMode.LEGACY);
			builder.addBinaryBody("file", byteArray, ContentType.APPLICATION_PDF, f.getName());
			
			final HttpEntity entity = builder.build();
			
			final HttpPost post = new HttpPost(TARGET_URL);
			
			post.setHeader("Accept", "*/*");
			post.setHeader("Cookie", "ROUTEID=.node3; B1SESSION=xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx");
			post.setHeader("Authorization", "Bearer xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx");
			
			post.setEntity(entity);
			
			try( CloseableHttpClient client = buildClient())
			{
				final ClassicHttpResponse response = client.executeOpen(host, post, null);
				logger.info("response.getCode(): {}", response.getCode());
				
				final HttpEntity repoEntity = response.getEntity();
				
				if (Objects.nonNull(repoEntity))
				{
					logger.info("\n\n{}\n\n", EntityUtils.toString(repoEntity));
				}
				
				if (response.getHeaders() != null)
				{
					for (Header item : response.getHeaders())
					{
						logger.info(item.getName() + ": " + item.getValue());
					}
				}
			}
			
			
        }
        catch (Exception e)
        {
        	logger.error(e.getMessage(), e);
        }
		
		assertTrue( startInstant.isBefore(Instant.now()) );
    }
    
    private CloseableHttpClient buildClient() throws KeyManagementException, UnrecoverableKeyException, NoSuchAlgorithmException, KeyStoreException, CertificateException, IOException
    {
		final TrustStrategy acceptAllCerts = (cert, authType) -> true;
		
		final SSLContext sslcontext = SSLContexts.custom()
				.loadTrustMaterial(acceptAllCerts)
				.build();

		final DefaultClientTlsStrategy tlsStrategy = new DefaultClientTlsStrategy(sslcontext,
				HostnameVerificationPolicy.CLIENT, NoopHostnameVerifier.INSTANCE);
		
		final PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager connManager = PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder.create()
				.setTlsSocketStrategy((TlsSocketStrategy) tlsStrategy)
				.build();
		
		final CloseableHttpClient client = HttpClientBuilder.create()
		        .setConnectionManager(connManager)
		        .build();
		
		return client;
    }
}

 I use Sl4J and Logback for logging and bellow are the XML to configure the logging framework:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
	<include resource="org/springframework/boot/logging/logback/defaults.xml"/>
	
	<statusListener class="ch.qos.logback.core.status.NopStatusListener" />
	​
	<springProperty scope="context" name="springAppName" source="spring.application.name"/>
	<!-- Example for logging into the build folder of your project -->
	<property name="LOG_FILE" value="${BUILD_FOLDER:-build}/${springAppName}"/>​

	<!-- Appender to log to console -->
	<appender name="console" class="ch.qos.logback.core.ConsoleAppender">
		<filter class="ch.qos.logback.classic.filter.ThresholdFilter">
			<!-- Minimum logging level to be presented in the console logs-->
			<level>DEBUG</level>
		</filter>
		<encoder>
			<pattern>%d{dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss.SSS} [%X{X-Trace-Id}] [%thread] %-5level %logger{36}.%M:%line - %msg%n</pattern>
			<charset>utf8</charset>
		</encoder>
	</appender>
	
	<logger name="org.apache.http" level="DEBUG"/>
	<logger name="org.apache.hc.client5.http" level="debug"/>
	​
	<root level="INFO">
		<appender-ref ref="console"/>
	</root>
</configuration>

 Important to note that the tests with Postman worked as expected.

entry.title: 2026 Fixed Assets - Not Showing Values on Fixed Assets tab
entry.content:
Hi,
I need some assistance, none of my fixed assets are in 2026 except for one asset that was entered in 2026, but they are there for 2025.  I am looking at one and it shows depreciation an ending deprecation to 10/2032.

I ran the depreciation for 01/2026 but nothing appears except for the asset that was entered in 2026.

I also ran the Fiscal Year Change from 2025 to 2026 and from 2026 to 2027 but still nothing appears.

Can someone please help with this?


Brian Branco

entry.title: Question Regarding Thai Tax Localization Add-on with China Base Localization
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I would like to seek clarification regarding the Thai Tax Localization add-on in SAP Business One.

In Thailand, the Thai Tax Localization is typically deployed under the UK base localization provided by SAP. However, we currently have a scenario where a customer’s system is installed under the China base localization.

We would like to understand whether there are any differences or limitations in terms of:

  • Installation requirements

  • Technical configuration

  • Compatibility or dependency at the localization level

  • System validation or support constraints

Specifically, is the Thai Tax Localization technically supported or compatible with a China based installation?
Are there any known restrictions or recommended approaches in this scenario?

We would greatly appreciate any guidance from the SAP technical team or anyone who has experience with a similar setup.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: How to cleanly refund a partial A/R Down Payment Request balance without dummy invoices?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently implementing SAP Business One for a German company (GmbH) and we've hit a architectural wall regarding down payment refunds.

The Business Scenario:

  1. We create an A/R Down Payment Request for a large amount (e.g., 100,000 EUR). Note: We specifically use 'Request' instead of 'Invoice' because the business does not want to generate preliminary tax liabilities/deferred VAT before the customer actually pays.

  2. Customer pays 100% upfront -> Incoming Payment is created based on the Request. VAT is correctly recognized per German localization rules.

  3. Over the next few months, the customer makes several orders. We create A/R Reserve Invoices and draw down from the available down payment balance (e.g., utilizing 60,000 EUR in total).

  4. After 6 months, the contract ends, and we need to refund the remaining unused balance (40,000 EUR) back to the customer.

The Problem: To refund the money, we create an Outgoing Payment (Payment on Account) for 40,000 EUR. However, when we try to clear the balances via Internal Reconciliation, we hit the hardcoded system restriction: "A regular payment cannot be reconciled with a payment from a down payment request [Message 3821-45]"

Why standard workarounds are rejected:

  • SAP Note 3196811 workaround (Dummy Invoices): Creating technical Service A/R Invoices (to a clearing account) to absorb the balance, followed by an A/R Credit Memo, is strictly rejected by the client's CFO. It pollutes the sales ledger and confuses the reporting.

  • Manual Journal Entries (MJE): Highly undesirable in the German localization due to strict GoBD audit rules and the risk of messing up the VAT return (UStVA) when manually reversing tax groups.

  • Switching to A/R Down Payment Invoices: Not an option for this specific process, as it generates financial/tax postings before the customer makes a final decision to transfer funds.

My Question: Has anyone found a cleaner, more elegant workaround or best practice to refund a partial balance of an A/R Down Payment Request (while keeping VAT compliant) without using dummy marketing documents or risky manual journal entries?

Any insights or creative approaches would be highly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP BUSINESS ONE for SQL installation is failing
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are trying to install the SAP B1 10.0 for SQL 2019 on Windows server and the installation is failing in the server tools authentication action step of post-install is failing.

Please help us providing your suggestions in resolving this issue.

Thanks,

Nirmala

entry.title: The SAP Business One Client Application suddenly closes without error.
entry.content:
The SAP Business One Client Application closes automatically without displaying any errors during certain additions and updates in Windows 11 and Windows 10 versions, and does not appear in the dump file.

Has anyone experienced this issue and resolved it?

The SAP B1 version we use in our company is

SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.300) FP 2508 (64-bit).

The add-ons are:

CompuTec - CompuTec.Start SA 3.0.1.524

Boyum Solutions - B1 Usability Package 2025.08.01.1
